description: Perform an aerodynamic analysis workflow in QBlade for a NACA 23015 airfoil (5-digit series, 15% thickness, design Cl=0.3). Conduct an XFoil direct polar analysis with a Reynolds Number of 1,000,000, NCrit of 9, and Mach 0 for an Angle of Attack range of -10° to +20°. Extrapolate the resulting polar to the full 360° range and save the project as 'naca23015_analysis.wpa' in '/home/ga/Documents/projects/'.
